narrative:
Precinct Monroe North East (precinct in Miami County) has 882 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.4 percentage points.
